name: companion-chat
_note: mental-health.companion-chat is a Wysa-style supportive (NON-CLINICAL, never-diagnosing) reflection companion. When ctx.llm is present it routes through the conscious brain with a constrained support system-prompt; with NO llm it falls back to a DETERMINISTIC reply (verified in tests with no network/LLM). A lightweight risk scan sets riskFlag and surfaces a real 988 redirect on self-harm language REGARDLESS of LLM availability — the safety path is never LLM-gated. Always carries the 'not medical advice' disclaimer. Empty message rejects. Lens-action domain — not assassin-enumerable via runMacro.
